cover_family_selection_rationale: Quad canvas: RU meme collage + blog-host hero; см. memory/cover/quad-style-digital-meme-collage-ru.json
global_prompt_prefix: Russian meme collage, blog host hero, Cyrillic Impact captions, ironic SEO humor, no watermark,
global_prompt_suffix: 16:9 panels, consistent hero likeness, readable Russian meme text on each panel, high detail
global_negative_prompt: English text, Latin letters, watermark, logo, blurry, generic stock photo, no humor, panels without captions, extra fingers

composition_lock.layout_description: main subject right 55%, brand color band left
